components.desc: Core Game of Life logic: grid state, neighbor counting, step function with standard B3/S23 rules, toroidal wrap. Pure functions, no rendering. Self-test: assert blinker oscillates and glider translates after 4 steps.

HTML canvas renderer drawing grid cells each frame with 'alive' feel: cells fade in/out (age-based color/alpha trail) instead of hard on/off. Self-test: headless check that render function maps cell age to expected fill colors on a stub 2D context.

index.html + main loop: requestAnimationFrame ticking engine at ~10 gen/s while renderer draws at 60fps interpolating fades, random soup seed, auto-reseed when population stagnates. Self-test: node script runs loop logic 100 ticks headless, asserts generation count advances and stagnation reseed triggers.
